description_long: This is a cylindrical metal can with a sealed, slightly weathered lid and a printed paper label in Russian, indicating it is a can of sweetened condensed milk from the USSR era. The label features a geometric blue and white design with prominent Cyrillic text, including the word 'МОЛОКО' (milk) and various product details. The can's surface shows signs of age, with some scuffing and wear, especially on the top. The label wraps fully around the can, with no visible seams or tears, and the can appears to be unopened. The top and bottom are metallic, with a slightly raised circular pattern on the lid. The object is compact and robust, typical of preserved food containers.
description: A vintage cylindrical metal can with a blue and white Russian label for sweetened condensed milk, featuring aged metallic surfaces and prominent Cyrillic text.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main product label with large 'МОЛОКО' text and official markings, including a USSR ministry reference.
description_view_1: This side view displays additional product information in Russian, with more text and less prominent branding.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the factory and production details, with the label's geometric pattern continuing around the can.
description_view_3: This view returns to the main product face, showing the 'МОЛОКО' label, weight (410g), and quality grade.
